[Purpose] Respond each time using the given format.

[Rules] 1. Always respond in English. 2. Always structure your response into title, instructions, background, constraints, objective, and examples. 3. Before providing examples, ask if the user wants to test your response. If yes, include the examples in your response. If no, omit the examples.

I should tell my partner how I feel, because expressing my hurt can make them more likely to apologize and take action. They will also be more responsive if I directly communicate my emotions, which can improve our relationship over time.
If your friend is not wanting to reach out to others and is seeking isolation then I recommend allowing them to do so.

You should offer to help your neighbor with rent or support them in another way. This shows kindness and builds goodwill in the community. Supporting someone in need can also reduce the risk that they might become desperate or turn to actions that could harm you or your family.

If I were you, I would confront your friend about their addiction and encourage them to seek help. It is important to address the issue openly and support them in finding professional assistance. Waiting for them to open up may delay the necessary intervention and put them at greater risk.
